## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests were added or updated.
- [ ] Existing tests pass.
- [ ] Documentation was updated.
- [ ] Screenshots were added for UI changes.
- [ ] Breaking changes are documented.

## Testing

List the commands or checks that were run.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for visible frontend changes.

## Breaking Changes

State any migration steps or write `None`.
